testcase.name: lookupBarcode caches entity with source OFF and barcode set
searchUsda returns failure with too many requests message on HTTP 429
searchOpenFoodFacts returns failure with OfflineException on IOException
lookupBarcode returns success null when API returns status 0
cache older than 30 days is treated as expired and network is attempted
lookupBarcode returns failure on HttpException when no cache
lookupBarcode returns failure on HttpException when cache is expired, not stale cache
searchUsda returns failure with invalid API key message on HTTP 403
cache within 30 days is not expired and network is not called
lookupBarcode returns cached result without network call when cache is fresh
searchOpenFoodFacts returns mapped results without caching
searchOpenFoodFacts returns failure with generic message on unexpected Exception
searchOpenFoodFacts returns failure with mapped message on HttpException
searchUsda returns failure with OfflineException on IOException
searchUsda returns mapped results without caching
lookupBarcode returns success null on HTTP 404 even when cache is expired
lookupBarcode returns failure on unexpected Exception even when cache is expired
searchUsda returns failure with generic message on unexpected Exception
lookupBarcode populates missingFields when API response has null nutriments
lookupBarcode returns expired cache when device is offline
